name: Rust Axum Error Mapping
summary: Map application errors to Axum responses once at the transport boundary.

rules: Do not return application error enums directly as HTTP responses.
Map each expected use-case error to an intentional HTTP status and stable error body.
checks: Unexpected errors do not expose internal details in response bodies.
Known application errors have tests or explicit review coverage for status mapping.

items: Create a transport error type or mapper that implements IntoResponse.
Convert use-case errors into transport errors at the handler boundary with From or map_err.
Return stable machine-readable error codes when clients need branching behavior.
Log internal diagnostic detail separately from client-facing error payloads.
